synopsis:
Learning that King S'Shah of Serphidi is negotiating to host an Imperial base, Princess Leia sends Luke Skywalker, Cinda Tarheel, and Berl on an information-gathering mission. Reaching the Belial system, they are ambushed by Imperial TIE fighters. Tarheel's fighter is crippled and crash-lands on a mountain butte, and Luke and Berl follow her down. As they confirm she is alive, lizard-mounted Serps attack, killing Berl with an energy-lance and taking Tarheel prisoner to King S'Shah's castle.

While tracking them, Luke saves an aging Serp named Elglih from a carnivorous plant and learns Elglih is loyal to the Rebellion and wants S'Shah deposed. The only lawful way to unseat the king is through a deadly contest called a Doom-Joust, which Elglih enters, naming Luke his squire. On the day of the joust, Elglih admits he is too frail to win, so Luke takes his place and challenges S'Shah directly. Luke dismounts the king, but as S'Shah readies a hidden micro-jolt weapon, Elglih's warning lets Luke spin around and kill him. Elglih becomes the new monarch, pledges to keep the Empire away from Serphidi, and Tarheel is freed as the two pilots return to Arbra.
title: Star Wars (1977) #64: Serphidian Eyes
